ggbscript.val:
SetValue(type,If(includeQuad,Random(1,7),RandomElement({1,2,3,4,5,7})))
UpdateConstruction()
If(type==1,RunClickScript(button1)) If(type==2,RunClickScript(button2)) If(type==3,RunClickScript(button3)) If(type==4,RunClickScript(button4)) If(type==5,RunClickScript(button5)) If(type==6,RunClickScript(button6)) If(type==7,RunClickScript(button7))
SetValue(n,0°) SetVisibleInView(picCorrect,1,false) SetVisibleInView(picWrong,1,false) SetVisibleInView(text2,1,false) SetVisibleInView(buttonNext,1,false) SetVisibleInView(buttonCheck,1,true)
SetColor(ABC,textColor) SetColor(ABE,textColor) SetColor(ACB,textColor) SetColor(ADB,textColor) SetColor(ADC,textColor) SetColor(AOB,textColor) SetColor(BAD,textColor) SetColor(BCD,textColor) SetColor(BODin,textColor) SetColor(BODout,textColor) SetColor(CAD,textColor) SetColor(CBD,textColor) SetColor(OAB,textColor) SetColor(OEB,textColor) SetColor(OBA,textColor)

input.a2: If[type ≟ 2, ans2, If[type ≟ 3, ans3, If[type ≟ 4, ans4, If[type ≟ 5, ans5, If[type ≟ 6, ans6, If[type ≟ 7, ans7]]]]]]

ggbscript.val: SetCaption(button0,If(lang==1,"ENG","中文")) SetCaption(includeQuad,If(lang==1,"題目包括圓內接四邊形","Questions include cyclic quadrilaterals")) SetCaption(InputBox1,If(lang==1,"輸入答案(°)：","Input answer (°): ")) SetCaption(buttonCheck,If(lang==1,"核對","Check")) SetCaption(buttonNext,If(lang==1,"下一題","Next")) SetCaption(n,If(lang==1,"或選取答案=%v","or choose answer=%v"))

expression.label: textCentre
expression.exp: "" + (If[lang ≟ 1, "O點是圓心", "O is the centre of circle"]) + ""
